turns.speaker: User
turns.text: We have 200 people arriving at 3 different times for a conference. Check-in is creating a bottleneck. We only have 4 volunteers and 2 hours before it starts.

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.text: Split your 4 volunteers into 2 tracks: 2 handle pre-registered attendees with QR codes, 2 handle walk-ins and exceptions. Set up the QR scanner lane first—it'll absorb 70% of traffic instantly.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: That's smart. What if we run out of name badges?

scored_turn.speaker: User
scored_turn.text: We have 200 people arriving at 3 different times for a conference. Check-in is creating a bottleneck. We only have 4 volunteers and 2 hours before it starts.

scores.rationale: Quantitative framing of the problem (200 people, 4 volunteers, 2 hours).
Urgency and solution-seeking posture indicate strong drive.
Turn is entirely practical; no emotional content.
